name: Wingman Idea Workflow
description: Complete workflow for recording ideas, classification, and automated project setup

steps.name: Idea Recording
steps.description: Capture and classify the new idea
steps.action: Ask the user to describe their idea, then create structured documentation in Obsidian

steps.name: Classification
steps.description: Determine if this is a new product or feature for existing product
steps.action: Analyze the idea and classify it appropriately

steps.name: Environment Setup
steps.description: Setup appropriate development environment based on classification
steps.action: Execute setup scripts and create necessary structures

steps.name: Documentation Creation
steps.action: Setup Obsidian structure with templates and cross-references

steps.name: Development Planning
steps.description: Create initial development roadmap and tasks
steps.action: Generate project plan and development checklist

outputs: Git worktree (for features) or new product structure
